openPositions.title: Senior Flutter Developer
openPositions.description: We're seeking a senior Flutter developer to lead mobile app development projects and mentor junior developers.
requirements: Strong understanding of state management (Bloc, Provider, Riverpod)
Experience with REST APIs and GraphQL
responsibilities: Lead Flutter app development from conception to deployment
Mentor junior developers and conduct code reviews
Collaborate with design and backend teams
Optimize app performance and user experience
Implement best practices and coding standards

openPositions.title: UI/UX Designer
openPositions.description: Join our design team to create beautiful, intuitive user interfaces and experiences for mobile applications.
requirements: Proficiency in Figma, Sketch, or Adobe XD
Strong portfolio demonstrating mobile app designs
Understanding of design systems and accessibility
responsibilities: Create wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity designs
Conduct user research and usability testing
Develop and maintain design systems
Collaborate with developers to ensure design implementation
Present design concepts to clients and stakeholders

openPositions.title: React Native Developer
openPositions.description: Looking for a React Native developer to build cross-platform mobile applications with cutting-edge features.
requirements: 2+ years of React Native development experience
Knowledge of Redux or Context API
Familiarity with mobile app deployment processes
responsibilities: Develop cross-platform mobile applications
Integrate with native modules and third-party libraries
Collaborate with backend developers for API integration
Optimize app performance for both platforms
Maintain code quality and documentation

openPositions.title: DevOps Engineer
openPositions.description: Help us build and maintain robust CI/CD pipelines and cloud infrastructure for our mobile and web applications.
requirements: Experience with AWS, Google Cloud, or Azure
Knowledge of Docker, Kubernetes, and containerization
Experience with CI/CD tools (GitHub Actions, Jenkins)
responsibilities: Design and maintain CI/CD pipelines
Manage cloud infrastructure and deployments
Monitor application performance and security
Automate deployment and scaling processes
Collaborate with development teams on infrastructure needs

openPositions.title: Product Manager
openPositions.description: Lead product strategy and roadmap for our mobile applications, working closely with development and design teams.
requirements: Experience with mobile app product development
Strong analytical and data-driven decision making
responsibilities: Define product strategy and roadmap
Gather and prioritize product requirements
Work with cross-functional teams to deliver products
Analyze user feedback and market trends
Drive product launches and feature rollouts

openPositions.title: QA Engineer
openPositions.description: Ensure the quality and reliability of our mobile applications through comprehensive testing and automation.
requirements: Attention to detail and analytical thinking
responsibilities: Design and execute comprehensive test plans
Perform manual and automated testing
Identify, document, and track bugs
Collaborate with development teams on bug fixes
Maintain and improve testing processes
